title: Extended health degradation — API balance zero (26hr)
rootCause: Anthropic API balance hit $0. Health checks reported 'degraded' status continuously for ~26 hours. Telegram alert system silently failed — gateway could not fire alerts while API was unavailable.
impact: Internal ops degraded ~26hrs. No client impact (P1 ops only). 274 health_failure events logged. 99 delegation_fail batch events logged by obs-collector on recovery.
resolution: Batch close — incident resolved, post-mortem complete or superseded. Closed by Yoda with Ken approval 2026-05-11.
prevention: Auto-reload threshold ($50) should prevent recurrence. Root gap: alert system was non-functional during the exact scenario it was needed for. Need fallback alert path that does not depend on Anthropic API.
